title: Linked-Intent Development
tagline: How to write code when your compiler speaks English.
description: A Claude Code plugin marketplace for Linked-Intent Development — structure the English your agent compiles so design, specs, tests, and code stay in sync.

quickstart.note: Register the marketplace in Claude Code.
Install the arrow-maintenance overlay for spec-to-code coherence audits.
Bootstrap your project — adds a docs/ tree and LID directives to CLAUDE.md.
